title: Happy New Year + Manifesto
excerpt: Starting off the first Monday of 2016 by scripting a manifesto I originally wrote down over a year ago . You can see the big difference in my writing as I have been practicing. When I am asked about writing…
body:
Starting off the first Monday of 2016 by scripting a manifesto I originally wrote down over a year ago. You can see the big difference in my writing as I have been practicing. When I am asked about writing with watercolors, I am always telling people that the only thing that will make any improvements is practice, practice, practice. It really applies to so much in life, especially in creative endeavors. Hope your new year is off to a fabulous start!

I'm using this watercolor set from Michaels and I have finally tried a waterbrush and found one that I love by Tim Holtz/Ranger. If you have a favorite quote – silly, snarky or simple in its’ wisdom, please share in the comments!
